web_results.title: President to nominate Fed’s Bowman as Vice Chair of Supervision | America's Credit Unions
web_results.description: President Donald Trump announced Monday that he plans to nominate Michelle Bowman as the Fed’s Vice Chair for Supervision, a position that oversees bank regulation, supervision, and rulemaking.

web_results.title: Michelle Bowman - Wikipedia
web_results.description: After seven years as a Federal Reserve board member, President Trump nominated Bowman to succeed Michael Barr as Vice Chair for Supervision of the board, a position she was confirmed for in early June 2025.

web_results.description: President Donald Trump will nominate Federal Reserve Governor Michelle Bowman to be the central bank’s next vice chair for supervision as soon as Wednesday, according to a person familiar with the matter.
